name: pkos-workspace
description: Unified management for Personal Knowledge OS

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && venv\Scripts\activate && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.lint:all: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && flake8 app
